arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk details how Slot has slotted in neatly at Liverpool – Keeping Reds on their toes
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has detailed how Arne Slot has fitted in neatly at Liverpool, replacing Jurgen Klopp with little fanfare. Voetbal Primeur cover comments from the defender today made in an interview with Viaplay in which he lavishes praise on Slot and the work he’s done at Liverpool so far.
